title: Add verified recall source adapters
goal: Extend operator recall beyond caller-supplied references by adding explicit source adapters that can verify receipts, PRs, Bureau tasks and friction records before marking recall source authenticity as proven.

metadata.source: deferred from PR #116 hardening; PR #116 intentionally remains caller_supplied_unverified
metadata.non_goal: Does not create a persistent recall store or change Bureau/GitHub state.

acceptance.assertion: Receipt references are verified against bounded local receipt evidence with hash/path checks before evidence_authenticity can be claimed.
PR references are verified against live GitHub read-only PR view/check data with head/repo/number binding and explicit freshness metadata.
Bureau task references are verified against registry task files without inferring completion unless verification fields are present.
Friction event references are verified against the bounded friction log or exported friction summary without rewriting raw events.
Unverified sources remain labelled caller_supplied_unverified and cannot silently upgrade to current_truth.
Focused tests cover verified source, stale source, missing source, malformed source and mixed verified/unverified export.
